name: Google Genai
description: LLM ElizaOS plugin for google genai

GOOGLE_GENERATIVE_AI_API_KEY.label: Generative Ai Api Key
GOOGLE_GENERATIVE_AI_API_KEY.help: API key for Google Generative AI (Gemini) obtained from Google AI Studio.

GOOGLE_EMBEDDING_MODEL.label: Embedding Model
GOOGLE_EMBEDDING_MODEL.help: Overrides the default text embedding model used by Google Generative AI.

GOOGLE_IMAGE_MODEL.label: Image Model
GOOGLE_IMAGE_MODEL.help: Overrides the default image analysis model used by Google Generative AI.

GOOGLE_SMALL_MODEL.label: Small Model
GOOGLE_SMALL_MODEL.help: Overrides the default small language model used for fast text/object generation.

GOOGLE_LARGE_MODEL.label: Large Model
GOOGLE_LARGE_MODEL.help: Overrides the default large language model used for complex text/object generation.

SMALL_MODEL.label: Model
SMALL_MODEL.help: General fallback environment variable for the small model name when GOOGLE_SMALL_MODEL is not set.

LARGE_MODEL.label: Model
LARGE_MODEL.help: General fallback environment variable for the large model name when GOOGLE_LARGE_MODEL is not set.

IMAGE_MODEL.label: Model
IMAGE_MODEL.help: General fallback environment variable for the image model name when GOOGLE_IMAGE_MODEL is not set.
